description: SavedStacks::insertFrames — Error.captureStackTrace In Suspended Async Generator Produces Empty Saved Stack, Reparenting Indexes Empty mozilla::Vector. Bug 1945318 (sec-high). When Error.captureStackTrace is called inside an async generator that has yielded, the SavedStacks::insertFrames function attempts to reparent the captured stack. However, the generator's suspended frame produces an empty saved stack (zero frames). The reparenting logic does not check for this empty case and accesses an invalid index in the frame vector (mozilla::Vector), triggering an assertion failure (aIndex < mLength) in debug builds and a segmentation fault (out-of-bounds memory access) in release builds. The vulnerability requires the experimental error_capture_stack_trace preference to be enabled. The fix by mgaudet (ceea43c1678f) adds a guard to skip reparenting when the captured stack is empty.

fixes.description: Bug 1945318 - Don't try to reparent an empty stack r=jandem
